keyPoints: Test multiple units of code together

questions.question: What is a test case?
keyPoints: Set of inputs, expected results, and execution conditions
Used to test a piece of software

questions.question: What is a test suite?
keyPoints: Used to test a piece of software

questions.question: Explain the difference between unit testing, integration testing, and validation testing.
keyPoints: Unit testing: individual units of code
Integration testing: multiple units of code together
